title: Osmania University Time Table 2026 Out - Download May June Exam Schedule

detail.title: Osmania University Time Table 2026 Out - Download May June Exam Schedule
detail.short_info: Osmania University Time Table 2026 released for May/June exams. Check MBA, M.Phil, Psy.D exam schedules, backlog/ improvement dates, and download PDF at ouexams.in.

sections.heading: Osmania University Time Table 2026 Out - Download May June Exam Schedule

content.text: Osmania University has officially released the Osmania University Time Table 2026 for various postgraduate and diploma examinations. The schedules are now available for MBA programmes across multiple semesters and batches along with M.Phil, Psy.D and Professional Diploma in Clinical Psychology exams for May/June 2026 session.
Students can check the detailed exam dates and download the official notifications from the university examination portal.
Visit Official Osmania University Time Table Page

links.text: Visit Official Osmania University Time Table Page

content.text: Osmania University has published the Time Table 2026 for several programmes including MBA (CBCS, Evening, Tech. Mgmt., Tourism), M.Phil Clinical Psychology, Psy.D Clinical Psychology and Professional Diploma examinations. Most notifications were released on 06 May 2026.

Osmania University Time Table 2026 includes detailed schedules for backlog, improvement and regular examinations of various management and psychology programmes. The exams are scheduled for May and June 2026.

sections.heading: Osmania University Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Osmania University has released multiple time tables for May/June 2026 examinations. Below is the list of programmes and their respective exam schedules.

rows: IV Semester (Regular & Backlog) & I, II, III Semesters

sections.heading: How to Download Osmania University Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the Osmania University Time Table 2026 by following these simple steps.

items: Visit the official examination portal of Osmania University at ouexams.in.
Click on the Exam Notifications section.
Look for the May/June 2026 time table notifications for your course.
Click on the relevant notification to view or download the PDF.
Save the file on your device for future reference.
Print a copy and highlight your exam dates.

content.text: Always verify the schedule as per your batch and semester before starting your preparation.
Go to Official Exam Notifications

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Osmania University Time Table 2026

content.text: The official Osmania University Time Table 2026 notifications provide complete information regarding the upcoming examinations.

items: Programme name and semester details
Batch year and admission details
Regular, Backlog and Improvement exams
Exact examination dates and month
Notification release date
Important instructions for students.
